name: @midnight-protocol/caller-contract
description: The minimal signet caller Compact contract: submits a signature request with contract-fixed calldata and verifies the MPC's Schnorr response. src/index.ts is the curated export surface — this IS the "sdk" face of the package.

scripts.compile: COMPACT_PATH=../../node_modules compact compile --skip-zk --feature-zkir-v3 src/signet-caller.compact src/managed/signet-caller && rm -f src/managed/SignetNotifier && ln -sfn ../../../signet-contract/src/managed src/managed/SignetSigner
scripts.compile:zk: COMPACT_PATH=../../node_modules compact compile --feature-zkir-v3 src/signet-caller.compact src/managed/signet-caller && rm -f src/managed/SignetNotifier && ln -sfn ../../../signet-contract/src/managed src/managed/SignetSigner
